canonical_reports.purpose: Latest sampled extended evaluation report with replay, coverage, seed stability, and sample-size convergence artifact links.
canonical_reports.generation_command: python experiments\generate_result_report.py --results runs\windows_eval_suite_extended\windows_eval_suite_20260612_224531\aggregate_results.csv --summary runs\windows_eval_suite_extended\windows_eval_suite_20260612_224531\aggregate_summary.csv --suite-metadata runs\windows_eval_suite_extended\windows_eval_suite_20260612_224531\suite_metadata.json --replay-index runs\windows_eval_suite_extended\windows_eval_suite_20260612_224531\replays\replay_index.json --sampling-coverage docs\sampling_coverage_report.md --seed-stability docs\seed_stability_report.md --sample-size-convergence docs\sample_size_convergence_report.md --output docs\result_report.md
cautions: Sampled extended subset, not exhaustive extended grid.
Does not support real-world performance or safety claims.

canonical_reports.purpose: Paper-style technical description of RAST MVP-0 scope, method, architecture, observed results, and limitations.
canonical_reports.generation_command: Manual documentation update; cross-check against docs\result_report.md and canonical run artifacts.
cautions: Technical report is explanatory, not a final research claim.
Numeric claims should be checked against the latest result report.

canonical_reports.purpose: Comparison between the default baseline suite and sampled extended candidate suite.
canonical_reports.generation_command: python experiments\compare_eval_runs.py --baseline-results runs\windows_eval_suite\windows_eval_suite_20260612_162821\aggregate_results.csv --baseline-summary runs\windows_eval_suite\windows_eval_suite_20260612_162821\aggregate_summary.csv --candidate-results runs\windows_eval_suite_extended\windows_eval_suite_20260612_224531\aggregate_results.csv --candidate-summary runs\windows_eval_suite_extended\windows_eval_suite_20260612_224531\aggregate_summary.csv --candidate-metadata runs\windows_eval_suite_extended\windows_eval_suite_20260612_224531\suite_metadata.json --candidate-coverage docs\sampling_coverage_report.md --candidate-seed-stability docs\seed_stability_report.md --candidate-sample-size-convergence docs\sample_size_convergence_report.md --output docs\eval_comparison_report.md
cautions: Differences may come from sample composition.
Comparison is sensitivity exploration, not planner superiority evidence.

canonical_reports.purpose: Coverage analysis for sampled extended evaluation axes.
cautions: Coverage is a sampling representativeness check.
Coverage score is not a model or planner performance metric.

canonical_reports.purpose: Seed-to-seed stability analysis for sampled extended evaluation.
cautions: Seed variation is sampling sensitivity, not real-world performance variation.

canonical_reports.purpose: Sample-size convergence and sampling quality score report for sampled extended evaluation.
cautions: Sampling quality score is a heuristic reliability score.
It is not a RAST performance score.

canonical_runs.replay_index_path: per-seed replay indexes recorded in seed_sweep_index.json
per-run replay indexes recorded in sample_size_sweep_index.json

configs.expected_use: Routine regression and default report regeneration.

configs.purpose: Large threshold, uncertainty, relation, and noise sensitivity grid.
Sampled execution profile for the extended grid.

configs.expected_use: Local smoke or diagnostic episode run.

replay_artifacts.limitation: Replay artifacts reconstruct metadata/action/evidence traces, not visual replay.

interpretation_boundaries: Not real robot, real perception, or real sensor evidence.
Sampled extended result is not exhaustive grid result.
Sampling quality score is a heuristic reliability score, not RAST performance.
Planners are deterministic rule-based experimental policies.
